llm_keywords.evidence: |I| ranges from 6.899103373692976e-103 A at +0.1 V to 2.3994540300343092e-05 A at -6 V, a span of about 97.43 decades.

At matched high voltages, |I| is similar on both sides: 2.3994540300343092e-05 A at -6 V versus 2.2494143112878067e-05 A at +6 V; 1.7789642201467646e-09 A at -2 V versus 1.9130444881257897e-09 A at +2 V.
The smallest listed |I| values occur near the lowest |V| values: 8.897350992969297e-103 A at -0.1 V and 6.899103373692976e-103 A at +0.1 V.

Although the overall trend rises with |V|, adjacent points fluctuate; for example on the positive side |I| changes from 1.8563767293971126e-05 A at 5.45 V down to 1.795139225310024e-05 A at 5.5 V and 1.2995820311170867e-05 A at 5.55 V.
ln(|I|/V^2) changes from about -230.63 at +0.1 V and -230.38 at -0.1 V to about -14.29 at +6 V and -14.22 at -6 V.
